title: helianthemum cylindrifolium
intro: Helianthemum cylindrifolium, also known as Rockrose or Dwarf Rockrose, is a flowering plant species within the Cistus family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which may aid in wound healing and reducing inflammation. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, improving digestion, and acting as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Helianthemum cylindrifolium include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
